## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->


## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Docs / CI / tooling only


## Testing
<!-- How was this tested? Which test files were added or updated? -->

- [ ] Backend unit tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Frontend unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript type check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Manually tested in local dev environment

### Test coverage delta
<!-- e.g. "Coverage increased from 63% → 67%" — the CI bot will post this automatically -->


## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (Ruff passes)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
- [ ] I have updated relevant docs (`docs/`, `README.md`, `DEPLOYMENT.md`)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are committed
- [ ] No unnecessary `console.log` or debug statements remain
